perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a POV shot from a moving scooter heading toward a Costco warehouse entrance; large text overlays and a cartoon character (Ralph) are visible. (2) A rapid-fire montage begins, showcasing various grocery products stacked on shelves inside the store. (3) Each product is displayed for approximately 1-2 seconds, including vacuum-packed beef, frozen fish, boxes of snacks, juices, wines, fruits, and household cleaning supplies. (4) The camera pans across aisles and into refrigerators, ending with a shot of pink Care Bears plush toys.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic dance music starts immediately. (2) A male voice speaks in a very fast, rhythmic, and enthusiastic tone, introducing the 'Costco Weekly Special.' (3) Throughout the video, the same male voice rapidly calls out the name of each product and its discounted price in sync with the visual cuts. (4) Background ambient noise of the warehouse is non-existent, replaced entirely by the studio-quality vocal recording and BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 好市多 每週特價速報 03/03~03/09 記得追蹤我們' - Informative and inviting tone. (2) Functional Text: For each item shown, text displays the brand, product name, 'Original Price' (原價), 'Discount' (-金額), and 'Special Price' (特價). (3) Brands mentioned include 美國特選, 萬歲牌, 盛香珍, 義美, POCKY, 明治, 嘉芬娜, 麗滋, RICHY, 樂事, MENAGE A TROIS, 桂格, 樂天, 奇美, UCC, 李施德霖, 吉列, and 善存.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (scooter ride) -> Rapid Montage of Discounted Products -> Outro (final product list)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 person riding the scooter at the start, at least 2 shoppers visible in the background of the meat aisle.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of high industrial shelving, refrigerated display cases, and bulk packaging typical of a warehouse-style supermarket environment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a high-speed promotional catalog for Costco Taiwan's weekly discounts (March 3 to March 9). Its objective is to capture viewers' attention through rapid editing and an energetic vocal delivery, encouraging them to visit the store by highlighting specific price drops across a wide range of popular grocery and household items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of price tags, product names, and Costco branding combined with a call to follow for more deals.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of 'Wreck-It Ralph' sticker and extremely fast-paced price-reading narration style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a 'shopping haul' or 'deals alert' format popular on social media platforms like TikTok/Reels to maximize information density in a short time.
